title: Purdy & Figg | Microfiber Cleaning Cloth | Super Soft, Streak-Free Multipurpose Polishing Cloth | Lint-Free, Scratch-Resistant, Super Absorbent & Reusable | Home & Kitchen | Pack of 3 | Green
features: SUPER SOFT MICROFIBRE CLOTH | LINT-FREE & SCRATCH-RESISTANT – 3 pack of ultra-soft, large, highly absorbent multipack and perfect for kitchen cloths, dish cloths, car, bathroom cleaning, mirrors, and windows. This streak-free polishing cloth ensures a pristine finish, ideal for home & kitchen use.

POWERFUL CLEANING PERFORMANCE – Our premium microfibre cloth provides streak-free, lint-free results on glass, mirrors, countertops, and appliances. Ideal for kitchen cleaning, bathroom surfaces, and polishing, it works perfectly with multi-surface sprays—just spray and wipe for a spotless finish.

REUSABLE, DURABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY – Built to last with reinforced edges, resisting wear after multiple washes. Ultra-absorbent, quick-drying, and lightweight ideal for multipurpose cleaning, dusting, wiping spills, and polishing surfaces in the kitchen, bathroom, and throughout the home.

HYPER-ABSORBENT & QUICK-DRYING – Purdy & Figg Microfibre Cloths absorb 10x their weight instantly, leaving no lint or streaks. Ultra-soft, lightweight, and fast-drying after washing, they’re perfect for kitchen cloths, dish cloths, bathroom cleaning, windows, and polishing surfaces—wet or dry.

ECO-FRIENDLY, NON-TOXIC & DURABLE: A sustainable, magic cleaning, absorbent, chemical-free cleaning solution that reduces waste and withstands repeated use. Designed for a streak-free, lint-free finish, it’s perfect for household cleaning, glass, mirrors, countertops, and appliances while being gentle on delicate surfaces.
